desc.zh-Hans: 这是架空的‘浪洲都市圈’，都市圈分别是浪洲，银城，宿林，白叶四个城市，轨道交通共162条线路，主要特色是奇葩车站，欢迎观看
desc.en: This is the fictional "Langzhou Metropolitan Area,” consisting of four cities: Langzhou, Yincheng, Sulin, and Baiye. The metropolitan area has a total of 162 rail transit lines, with its main feature being the unique stations. Welcome to watch

reference: 爱发电,Sun May 24 2026 12:11:58 GMT+0900 (日本标准时间)
